product_overview: Admin-facing web dashboard to manage students, room assignments and payments for university housing. (See PRD Files page 1: test instructions and example admin credentials admin@youruniversity.edu / admin1234 — sign in, add student, assign room, make payment, then move student to another room.)
core_goals: Provide secure admin authentication and access to a management dashboard
Allow admins to create and manage student records
Support assigning and changing student room assignments and room management
Enable recording and viewing student payments
Surface validation and error states for all forms and workflows

features.name: User Login
features.description: Allow admins to authenticate with email and password to access the dashboard.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill email input field (e.g., admin@youruniversity.edu) -> Fill password input field (e.g., admin1234) -> Click Sign In to Dashboard button to submit -> See /dashboard loaded
Navigate to /login -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field (incorrect) -> Click Sign In to Dashboard button to submit -> See authentication error message

features.name: Add Student
features.description: Create a new student record from the student management page.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/students -> Click Plus button or Add Student button -> Fill in student details (all required fields) -> Submit form -> See new student listed on /dashboard/students
Navigate to /dashboard/students -> Click Plus button or Add Student button -> Fill in student details (omit required field) -> Submit form -> See validation error message for missing field

features.name: Assign Room
features.description: Assign an existing student to a room from the students page or room details modal.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/students -> Open student details -> Select a room from the dropdown or details modal -> Save the assignment -> See student's room updated in student details

Navigate to /dashboard/students -> Open student details -> Select a room from the dropdown or details modal (select a full/unavailable room) -> Save the assignment -> See room assignment error message

features.name: Make Payment
features.description: Record a payment for a student from the payments management page.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/payments -> Select student -> Enter amount -> Submit payment -> See new payment listed on /dashboard/payments
Navigate to /dashboard/payments -> Select student -> Enter amount (invalid or negative) -> Submit payment -> See payment validation error message

features.name: Move Student to Another Room
features.description: Change an existing student's room assignment to a different room.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/students -> Open student details -> Change the assigned room -> Save the new assignment -> See updated room reflected in the student record
Navigate to /dashboard/students -> Open student details -> Change the assigned room (to an invalid room) -> Save the new assignment -> See error message and previous room remains unchanged

user_interactions: Click Sign In to Dashboard button to submit

user_interactions: Click Plus button or Add Student button
